reason: Backend spec index for locating the relevant implementation guidance.
The implementation adds new open-api route, middleware, and model files and must follow the project's file-organization conventions.
The open-api endpoint must use partner-safe error responses without leaking internal details.
The implementation must preserve the route -> models -> db style without adding a service layer and should keep DTOs in the route layer.
Architecture diagnosis, upgrade path, endpoint contract draft, and code skeleton blueprint are the direct design input for this implementation task.
